title: Tesfli piercer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tesfli piercers''' were tiny, flying [[Insect/Legends|insects]], which inhabited the dense swamps of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gorsh]] and lived in swarms. Although their bites were not [[Death/Legends|lethal]], they sometimes carried the dangerous [[rotting disease]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' {{Mo}}

===Non-canon appearances===
*<!-- 2013-10-11 -->''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'' {{Mo}} {{C|As tesfli}}
